behaviorsAudited: createBridgeTool('Edit') returns a tool whose renderToolResultMessage dispatches to a local EditDiffView that renders the file path as a bold header and colors '+' lines green, '-' lines red, '@@' hunk headers cyan, '---'/'+++' lines dimmed (visual contract from upstream StructuredDiffList)
The toolResult content shape passed to EditDiffView carries the file path and the diff string in <edit-file>/<edit-diff> tags so the renderer can extract them via extractBridgeTag
If the tool result for Edit lacks the <edit-diff> envelope (e.g. dry-run preview only, or error case), the bridge falls back to the generic <Text> renderer instead of throwing
message-adapter.ts formatStructuredToolResult for tool_call_completed with toolName='Edit' produces the <edit-file>/<edit-diff> envelope shape that EditDiffView consumes

edgeCasesAudited: Edit result for a new file (no prior content, diff is all '+' lines) renders all additions in green without crashing on a missing '---' header
Edit result for a file deletion (all '-' lines) renders coherently with all deletions in red
Edit result with a multi-hunk diff renders all hunks, not just the first
Edit result whose diff string is empty falls back to a (No changes) indicator instead of an empty box
Edit result whose path is not a string (number, null, object) — formatStructuredToolResult drops the <edit-file> tag instead of emitting a malformed envelope; the diff body still goes through tagged
Edit result wrapped in the legacy single-string content (from before the structured projection) falls through to the generic Text renderer without crashing

behaviors.behavior: createBridgeTool('Edit') returns a tool whose renderToolResultMessage dispatches to a local EditDiffView that renders the file path as a bold header and colors '+' lines green, '-' lines red, '@@' hunk headers cyan, '---'/'+++' lines dimmed (visual contract from upstream StructuredDiffList)
behaviors.implementation: runtime/src/tui/bridges/tool-stubs.tsx:67-107 (bold header at line 86, +green at 91-92, -red at 93-94, @@cyan at 95-96, ---/+++ dim at 90); dispatch decision in runtime/src/agenc/adapters/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.ts:40-57 (exact-case 'Edit' + presence of '<edit-diff>' tag → 'edit-diff-view')
behaviors.test: runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-edit-bridge.test.tsx:41-49 (`expect((node as { type: unknown }).type).toBe(EditDiffView)`); visual fidelity asserted at lines 92-117 (bold header for src/foo.ts, green '+new', red '-old', cyan '@@'); +++/--- dim asserted at 119-139

behaviors.behavior: The toolResult content shape passed to EditDiffView carries the file path and the diff string in <edit-file>/<edit-diff> tags so the renderer can extract them via extractBridgeTag
behaviors.implementation: runtime/src/tui/bridges/message-adapter.ts:350-372 emits separate `<edit-file>` and `<edit-diff>` blocks; consumer-side extraction at runtime/src/tui/bridges/tool-stubs.tsx:72-73

behaviors.behavior: If the tool result for Edit lacks the <edit-diff> envelope (e.g. dry-run preview only, or error case), the bridge falls back to the generic <Text> renderer instead of throwing
behaviors.implementation: runtime/src/agenc/adapters/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.ts:50-56 (no '<edit-diff>' tag → 'generic') and runtime/src/tui/bridges/tool-stubs.tsx:253-257 (generic `<Box flexDirection="column"><Text>{joined}</Text></Box>` fallback); also reinforced at message-adapter.ts:373-375 (no diff field → falls back to stringResult)
behaviors.test: runtime/src/tools/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.test.ts:64-67 ('raw error string' on Edit → 'generic'), runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-edit-bridge.test.tsx:64-72 ('permission denied' → not EditDiffView), and runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:257-264 (error-path payload `{ result: { error: 'permission denied' } }` → single text block, no '<edit-diff>' tag)

edgeCases.implementation: runtime/src/tui/bridges/message-adapter.ts:358-361 (`typeof (result as { readonly path?: unknown }).path === 'string'` guard returns null when path is non-string, so the `<edit-file>` block is not pushed)
edgeCases.test: runtime/src/tui/openclaude/message-adapter.test.ts:239-255 across all three non-string shapes — `path: 123` (numeric, lines 240-244), `path: null` (lines 245-249), `path: { nested: 'obj' }` (object, lines 250-254). For each shape: blocks.length === 1 and blocks[0].text === '<edit-diff>...</edit-diff>' (no <edit-file> tag emitted, diff body intact)

edgeCases.edgeCase: Edit result wrapped in the legacy single-string content (from before the structured projection) falls through to the generic Text renderer without crashing
edgeCases.test: runtime/src/tools/upstream-tool-result-dispatch.test.ts:64-67 ('raw error string' on Edit → 'generic'), runtime/src/tools/tool-stubs-edit-bridge.test.tsx:64-72 ('permission denied' string → not EditDiffView), and 84-88 (`null` content → not EditDiffView, does not throw); the 'no envelope tags at all' defensive case at lines 187-192 ('raw text with no tags' fed directly into EditDiffView) provides additional coverage that the renderer falls back to (No changes) instead of crashing if invoked on a malformed payload
